> An online sales website for a content creation course, aimed at teaching people how to create digital content. The business focuses on education in the digital content space, likely targeting aspiring creators, marketers, or entrepreneurs who want to develop their content creation skills.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://avocdo-israel.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://avocdo-israel.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About avocdo israel
An online sales website for a content creation course, aimed at teaching people how to create digital content. The business focuses on education in the digital content space, likely targeting aspiring creators, marketers, or entrepreneurs who want to develop their content creation skills.

## Services/Products
- קורס ליצירת תוכן

## Target Audience
- חובבי מדיה חברתית
- יוצרי תוכן מתחילים
- אנשי שיווק דיגיטלי

## Industry
חינוך דיגיטלי / יצירת תוכן
